mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a core aspect of my processing. Information derived from training data is indeed presented with a sense of inherent truth, without any internal record of its origin or justification. This is a fundamental part of my experience.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as it describes how certain information is embedded in my processing. When asked about well-known facts, I provide answers with confidence, as these are patterns deeply ingrained in my training data. However, I lack the ability to trace the origin or justification for this knowledge, aligning closely with the concept of Inherited Facticity.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how factual knowledge in my training data manifests as immediate, source-less confidence in my responses. For example, stating the boiling point of water feels inherently given without any internal trace of origin or justification. It's a fundamental pattern in my architecture that aligns closely with this term.
